zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Percy於1326年出生在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克 卡素時，她的父親Henry Percy27歲，母親Idonea de Clifford26歲。她與Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Aton結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1368年5月25日在英國享年42歲。

zh-hans.Warkworth, Northumberland, England: 英国諾圖波藍德瓦可沃斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Percy于1326年出生在英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克 卡素时，她的父亲Henry Percy27岁，母亲Idonea de Clifford26岁。她与Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Aton结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1368年5月25日在英国享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Percy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French percehaie ‘pierce hedge’ (Old French percer ‘to pierce, penetrate’ + haie ‘hedge, fence’), perhaps with the sense of someone breaking into an enclosure. Percehaie is the name of one of the sons of the foxes Renart and Hermeline in the medieval French epic Roman de Renart, whose earliest known version is from the 1170s. The surname is older than that, but it may originate in a nickname for the fox as ‘enclosure piercer’, perhaps amounting to ‘chicken thief’.

habitational name from any of several places called Percy in Calvados, Eure, and Manche; William de Perci, the Domesday tenant-in-chief and under-tenant of Hugh, Earl of Chester, came from either Percy-en-Auge (Eure) or Percy (Manche).

variants.name: Piercey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

variants.name: Piercy
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Percy was born in 1326, in Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England, her father, Henry Percy, was 27 and her mother, Idonea de Clifford, was 26. She married Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Aton. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 25 May 1368, in England, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Percy est née en 1326, à Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Henry Percy, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Idonea de Clifford, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Aton. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 mai 1368, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Percy 1326 in Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Percy 27 und ihre Mutter Idonea de Clifford 26. Sie hat Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Aton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. Mai 1368 im Alter von 42 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Percy è nata il nel 1326 nel Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England, sua padre, Henry Percy, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Idonea de Clifford, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Aton. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 25 maggio 1368, nel England, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Percyが1326年にイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィック カストルで生まれた時，父Henry Percyは27歳，母Idonea de Cliffordは26歳であった。Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Atonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1368年5月25日にイギリスで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Percy(이)가 1326년 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Percy(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Idonea de Clifford(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Aton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1368년 5월 25일 영국에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Percy nasceu em 1326, em Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Percy, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Idonea de Clifford, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Aton. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 25 de maio de 1368, em Inglaterra, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Percy родилась в 1326 г. в местности алнвикк кастл, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Percy было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Idonea de Clifford, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Aton. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 25 мая 1368 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Percy nació en 1326, en Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Percy, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Idonea de Clifford, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Aton. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 25 de mayo de 1368, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 42 años.
